Mod.Name: Update Memoria
Mod.Description:
You are using an outdated version of Memoria. The mod catalog is not supported anymore for that outdated version and you need to update Memoria to access the new catalog.
Newer versions of Memoria can be installed with the option "Check for updates" or from the following pages: - Stable version: https://github.com/Albeoris/Memoria/releases/latest - Canary version: https://github.com/Albeoris/Memoria/releases/tag/canary
